name: Submit a massage claim on Maple Life

emit.text: Happy to help! I'll take your massage claim through the Maple Life portal — you can just watch. Opening the portal now.
Here's the sign-in page. It's a demo portal, so I'll sign in as jude.
We're in — this is your benefits overview. Let's start a new claim.
First question: who is the claim for? This dropdown is one of those custom ones that only listens to arrow keys, so I'll open it and pick you.
Now it wants the kind of care you received. I'll choose "Massage therapist".
Hm — the click didn't take. These custom radio buttons ignore clicks and want a keyboard press instead; it's a classic portal quirk. Let me focus it and press Space.
Time for the expense details from your receipt: June 14, 2026, a follow-up visit, $84.50.
One last look at the review page — claim for Jude Gao, massage therapy, one expense, total $84.50. Everything matches your receipt, so I'll submit it.
All done! Your $84.50 massage claim was submitted successfully — Maple Life says you'll hear back within 2 business days. Tip: save this session as an automation and next time it's a single click.
